notes: It can run on 800x600 fullscreen resolution, but there is glitch that on Boot Camp and Campaign section. When I click that, the screen freeze. The sounds still playing perfectly, but after I press Esc key its came back to main menu, which is no problem there. Fortunately on Battle section, the screen not freezing. I can play 15 minutes there, but when I press Esc the screen and sound glitched.
title: Army Men: Toys in Space
